test/TestValues.cpp File Reference
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string>
#include <climits>
#include "xmlrpcpp/XmlRpcValue.h"
#include "xmlrpcpp/XmlRpcException.h"
#include "xmlrpcpp/XmlRpcUtil.h"
#include <gtest/gtest.h>
